2024-11-15T02:24:56: Thin-plate weir with broad-crested flanks monitoring compensation flows and spillage from Burnhope Reservoir.
Thin-plate weir with broad-crested flanks monitoring compensation flows and spillage from Burnhope Reservoir and a small natural catchment.
Catchment geology: Carboniferous Limestone and Millstone Grit.
Flow regime influenced by Burnhope Reservoir.
